description: Style NoteSoft on the inside and sporty on the outside, these track pants from nike make for a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Crafted from soft polyester, these pants are ideal for your Sports training, jogging sessions or just laid back weekends. The fabric keeps you dry and comfortable while the sporty look does wonders for your casual style. Pair it with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes.Product DetailsDark grey track pants, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has an elasticated waist with drawstrings, two zipper pockets on the sides, printed Nike swoosh logo on the left thigh and zipper hemMaterial and Care86% polyester and 14% spandex Machine wash cold with like coloursDo not use softenersDo not bleach or dry cleanDo not ironLine dry
